name: Mai Plugin
description: Lightweight OpenClaw native bridge for the Mai shopping matchmaking skill and hosted registry.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to a Mai skill checkout. Defaults to MAI_ROOT, ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/mai, or ~/.hermes/skills/commerce/mai.

dataPath.description: Optional local Mai JSON data path. Defaults to MAI_DATA or ~/.local/share/mai/mai.json.

registryUrl.description: Optional hosted Mai registry URL. Defaults to MAI_REGISTRY_URL.

apiKey.description: Optional hosted Mai registry API key. Defaults to MAI_API_KEY.
